title: The Odyssey in IMAX is worth a long journey of your own - Engadget
summary: As the first Hollywood movie shot entirely on IMAX film, it's worth seeking out your nearest IMAX 70mm theater to see his complete vision. But, like Odysseus's journey itself, it's worth the effort to see it in real IMAX.
